privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. The task.json file contains only the following fields: id (delete_feed@1), version (1.0), env_id (emoncms_env@0.1), description, init, hooks, and success. The environment uses Docker containers running Emoncms (openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest), MariaDB 10.11, and Redis 7.0. The task setup creates a synthetic 'Test Feed' in Emoncms for the agent to delete. All data is synthetically generated—no real external datasets are used.
